subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Amín, upon him be My glory, arrived and presented a register of the names of the Party of God and His loved ones from the Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین علیه بهائی وارد و دفتری از اسماء حزب الله و اولیائه از جانب غلام
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @wisdom [hikmat]
